response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song in the opening segment (00:00-00:46) as 'Fashion Beat' by Sakura Miko via on-screen text. 2. Confirmed the composer as DECO*27 using a web search. 3. Used a web search to retrieve the full original lyrics in Japanese for 'Fashion Beat'. 4. Obtained an English translation of the lyrics for context. 5. Observed that the remainder of the video is purely spoken commentary/announcements with no vocal singing, so it is classified as containing no vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a virtual performance of the song 'Fashion Beat' by Sakura Miko, followed by a series of announcements regarding her birthday merchandise and collaborations.

scenes.description: A 3D animated music performance of the song 'Fashion Beat'. Sakura Miko sings and dances on a neon-lit stage. The title 'ファッションビート' (Fashion Beat) appears on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even if it hurts and I cover my eyes
A show of anxiety still reaches my ears
Since worrying won't change anything
There's nothing else to do but do it, right?
If it's going to break, I'll make it easy to fix
What kind of form can I aim for?
A jump without a run-up, a dive without a safety line
I want to praise the me of today, don't I?
I want to breathe, I want to resonate more
Hey, I might see something beyond myself
My delusions won't stop
Shall I try sniffing the fashion beat?
I can't spit out 'whatever' in my dreams
Is it myself who makes it come true?
Or is it left to someone else?
I just want to win against myself
New fashion beat, devouring love
I won't accept losing, it's flavorless
An evolution that turns to ash time and again
Personification of a bug that is reborn
Still, I won't let it rot, yeah, no

(let's rock)

Being pricked and prodded
I'm sick and tired of it
Sorry, that annoying wordplay
Please just put it away properly

Even though I know what to do
A jump without a run-up, a dive without a safety line
Thinking 'I don't feel like I can do it today'
Thinking 'I don't care,' isn't that impossible?
Hey, even if I compare myself to anyone else
It's totally boring, isn't it?

scenes.description: Sakura Miko appears on screen to talk about her birthday merchandise and upcoming collaborations. No vocal music plays.
